title: Information Technology Act, 2000
objective: Digital evidence and cyber-offence deck for online harm, platform liability, and compliance requests.

sections.topic: Penalty for damage to computer resources
sections.note: Civil-liability pathway for unauthorized access, data extraction, or disruption.
Applies where evidence suggests intentional alteration or deletion of source records.
Criminal escalation from acts listed under section 43 when dishonest intent appears.

sections.topic: Publishing or transmitting obscene material in electronic form
sections.note: Used in online publication and intermediary takedown response scenarios.

sections.topic: Directions for blocking public access to information
sections.note: Reference point for lawful blocking orders and platform compliance handling.

sections.topic: Exemption from liability of intermediary in certain cases
sections.note: Safe-harbour analysis for platforms that follow due diligence and notice handling.
